_note: Sanitised catalog of in-app chat workflows. Each entry is the user-facing intent the workflow handles; raw source and dispatch wiring lives in the maintainer-only archive.

workflows.description: The user wants to add a new step to their workflow
Applies automated troubleshooting fixes with clarification support
Basildon boy's gonna drop some lyric
The user says a click step failed, did not click, or does not work
Checks Cloudflare bot blocking failures and routes to support when bot detection bypass is already enabled
Handles empty Google Sheet reads by either opening the sheet for edits or enabling continue when empty
Suppresses non-critical errors by wrapping existing steps in try/catch or turning on continue on error
Guides users through adding basic form filling steps to their automation
Help users write or update data in Google Sheets by adding the read, find row, and write steps
Help users trigger an Axiom.ai automation from Zapier, an incoming webhook, or an external API
Routes macOS Chromium unsupported desktop-app errors to support with Mac system detail instructions
User wants to set up, update, or disable notifications for automation runs
Troubleshoots pages or URLs that fail to load
User wants to set up a proxy or change their proxy settings
Handles Write javascript errors that require the Run in app setting
Explains when a run most likely exceeded the maximum runtime for an individual run and offers upgrade guidance
The user says a scheduled automation runs at the wrong time, usually because of timezone, UTC, daylight saving, or local/cloud schedule settings
User wants to schedule their automation to run at a particular time, or disable an already set schedule
The user is running into issues with a selector not working
The user says their automation is slow, Chrome crashed, or they saw an oh snap browser crash
Speeds up scraper automations by reducing scraper retry attempts
User wants to sync, store, or resync cookies for logged-in sessions
The user says their automation appears stuck on running for a long time or the UI has not updated
The user should be routed to support, because they request it or because it is not clear how to assist them further
User wants to send data to a webhook or API endpoint
Generic troubleshooting workflow, used to handle a general user request as a fallback
Helps users who want to upgrade their subscription plan or need more monthly runtime
The user wants to do automate something with files, either uploading or downloading, locally or in the cloud
